steps.title: Find the unique fact
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the uniqueness of Bennett's accomplishment. The notes state that her book was the only Civil War memoir published by a Black woman.

steps.title: Rule out background details
steps.content: Choice A discusses where Bennett fled and worked. Choice B describes her work as a nurse and teacher. Choice C says the book is still available. None of these facts states what made the accomplishment unique.

steps.title: Choose uniqueness
steps.content: The statement that Bennett was the only Black woman to publish a Civil War memoir directly captures the unique accomplishment. The answer is D.
